Tests that calling `Object.prototype.isPrototypeOf` with `undefined` throws a `TypeError`.

# Purpose
This code is a test script that checks the behavior of the `Object.prototype.isPrototypeOf` method when called with `undefined` as the context. The script attempts to call `isPrototypeOf` on `undefined` and expects this operation to throw a `TypeError`. The `try` block contains the method call, and if no error occurs, the script will fail the test by calling `assert(false)`. If a `TypeError` is caught, the `catch` block verifies the error type using `assert(e instanceof TypeError)`, confirming the expected behavior. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific edge case for the `isPrototypeOf` method.
